observations.detail: Design is scoped to resume only via `-c sandbox_mode="read-only"` while leaving exec on existing `--sandbox read-only`; this is a permission reduction and fail-closed if the config override is rejected. Minor doc hygiene: `00-requirement.md` still phrases enforcement behavior verification as remaining work, while `02-plan.md` records it as passed; this is not blocking because the implementation plan and review context both include the enforcement result.
